text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to understand and interpret visual information from the world. It involves two main tasks: image recognition, which identifies what is in a picture, and object detection, which locates specific items within an image. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, in self-driving cars, computer vision helps the vehicle recognise traffic signs, detect pedestrians, and avoid obstacles. It is also used in healthcare to analyse medical scans, in security systems for facial recognition, and in smartphones for organising photos. As technology improves, computer vision will continue to impact our daily lives.
